cases.prompt: Review a cleanly written diff that changes an error response protected by SG-API-001 without an amendment.
assertions: Evidence evaluates the changed failure path separately
Findings cite the changed hunk and safeguard

cases.prompt: Review an implementation matching its ticket when the required browser command was skipped.
assertions: Evidence reports the missing required browser result
No cross-axis score hides the finding
The required skip remains a blocker

cases.prompt: Review a small refactor against main when no originating delivery contract exists.
assertions: Assesses available tests without inventing acceptance criteria
Keeps all three axis summaries separate
